Operation 'createUpload' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on key aspects for AI agent decision-making: (1) missing_output_details - doesn't specify what is returned (upload ID, metadata); (2) missing_input_details - doesn't clarify what parameters are required beyond file content; (3) missing_side_effects - doesn't explain that the file is stored and can be reused. Enhanced version explains the complete workflow, return value structure, and persistence model to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation in envelope creation workflows.

data.current_description: Uploads a file (PDF, DOCX, or PNG) for use in envelope documents. Maximum file size is 5 MB.
data.summary_suggestion: Upload document file for envelope use
data.description_suggestion: Uploads a document file (PDF, DOCX, or PNG) to be used in envelope documents. The uploaded file is stored and assigned a unique identifier for reference in envelope creation. Maximum file size is 5 MB. Returns the upload object containing the file ID, filename, file type, and upload timestamp. The uploaded file remains available for use in multiple envelopes.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on key aspects for AI agent decision-making: (1) missing_output_details - doesn't specify what is returned (upload ID, metadata); (2) missing_input_details - doesn't clarify what parameters are required beyond file content; (3) missing_side_effects - doesn't explain that the file is stored and can be reused. Enhanced version explains the complete workflow, return value structure, and persistence model to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation in envelope creation workflows.

message: Operation 'createEnvelope' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks details about what the request should contain, what the response includes (envelope_id, status), and the resulting state. Added specifics about request schema, response object, and initial envelope state for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Creates a new envelope containing documents and recipients for signing.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new envelope containing documents and recipients for signing. Accepts a CreateEnvelopeRequest with envelope details, documents, recipients, and optional authentication/ceremony settings. Returns the created Envelope object with a unique envelope_id and initial status. The envelope is ready for recipients to sign once created.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about what the request should contain, what the response includes (envelope_id, status), and the resulting state. Added specifics about request schema, response object, and initial envelope state for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'listEnvelopes' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too generic. Added information about pagination support, filtering/sorting capabilities, and the structure of the response (EnvelopeList with pagination links) to help AI agents understand filtering options and result navigation.

data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of envelopes.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a paginated list of envelopes with optional filtering and sorting. Supports pagination parameters (limit, offset) and returns an EnvelopeList containing envelope summaries and pagination links for navigation.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic. Added information about pagination support, filtering/sorting capabilities, and the structure of the response (EnvelopeList with pagination links) to help AI agents understand filtering options and result navigation.

message: Operation 'getEnvelope' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description lacks specificity about what 'details' means. Added clarity that it returns the full Envelope object with all properties (documents, recipients, status, metadata) to help AI agents understand the completeness of the response.

data.current_description: Returns the details of an envelope.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete details of a specific envelope by envelope_id. Returns the full Envelope object including documents, recipients, status, and all associated metadata.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about what 'details' means. Added clarity that it returns the full Envelope object with all properties (documents, recipients, status, metadata) to help AI agents understand the completeness of the response.

message: Operation 'updateEnvelope' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too narrow and lacks context. Clarified that this is a label-only update operation, specified it's a partial update, and indicated the response returns the updated Envelope object. This prevents AI agents from attempting to modify other envelope properties.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an envelope's label field. Accepts a partial update request with the new label value and returns the updated Envelope object. Only the label field can be modified through this operation.
data.reasoning: Description is too narrow and lacks context. Clarified that this is a label-only update operation, specified it's a partial update, and indicated the response returns the updated Envelope object. This prevents AI agents from attempting to modify other envelope properties.

message: Operation 'listEnvelopeEvents' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description lacks context about what events represent and what the response structure contains. Added clarification that events track envelope state changes/actions, specified the response is an EventList with pagination support, and indicated the envelope_id parameter requirement for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of events for an envelope.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a paginated list of events for a specific envelope by envelope_id. Events track state changes and actions on the envelope. Returns an EventList containing event records with pagination links for navigation.
data.reasoning: Description lacks context about what events represent and what the response structure contains. Added clarification that events track envelope state changes/actions, specified the response is an EventList with pagination support, and indicated the envelope_id parameter requirement for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'createDeliverable' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. The current description is too brief and lacks context about what deliverables are, their purpose, and state requirements. Added explanation of deliverable purpose, envelope state requirement, return value details, and side effects (availability for retrieval/audit) to improve AI agent understanding of when and why to use this operation.

data.current_description: Creates a new deliverable for a completed envelope.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new deliverable for a completed envelope. Deliverables are post-signature artifacts generated from signed documents. Requires the envelope to be in a completed state. Returns the created deliverable object with metadata and a pre-signed download URL. The deliverable becomes available for retrieval and audit purposes.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks context about what deliverables are, their purpose, and state requirements. Added explanation of deliverable purpose, envelope state requirement, return value details, and side effects (availability for retrieval/audit) to improve AI agent understanding of when and why to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getRecipient' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about what recipient details are returned and the operation's use cases. Enhanced with information about returned fields (contact, authentication, status, places, routing), parameter requirements, and practical use cases to help AI agents understand when to call this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Returns the details of a recipient.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific recipient by ID. Returns the recipient object including contact information, authentication requirements, signing status, assigned places, and routing position within the envelope. Use this to check recipient status, verify contact details, or determine next actions in the signing workflow.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what recipient details are returned and the operation's use cases. Enhanced with information about returned fields (contact, authentication, status, places, routing), parameter requirements, and practical use cases to help AI agents understand when to call this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'resendRecipient' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description mentions rate limiting and status requirements but lacks context about the operation's purpose and return value. Added explanation of use cases (retry after failures, prompt inactive recipients), clarified status requirement rationale, and specified return value to improve AI agent understanding of when and why to use this operation.

data.current_description: Resends the signing invitation to a recipient. Subject to rate limiting. Recipient status must be sent or soft_bounced.
data.description_suggestion: Resends the signing invitation to a recipient. Recipient status must be sent or soft_bounced to allow resending. Subject to rate limiting to prevent abuse. Returns the updated recipient object reflecting the resend action. Use this to retry delivery after initial send failures or to prompt recipients who have not yet acted.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions rate limiting and status requirements but lacks context about the operation's purpose and return value. Added explanation of use cases (retry after failures, prompt inactive recipients), clarified status requirement rationale, and specified return value to improve AI agent understanding of when and why to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of events for a recipient.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of events for a specific recipient, including signing actions, status changes, and delivery attempts. Returns an EventList object with pagination links for navigating results. Events are ordered chronologically and provide audit trail information for tracking recipient activity throughout the signing ceremony.

data.current_description: Creates a new signing ceremony for a recipient.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new signing ceremony for a recipient, initiating an interactive signing session. A ceremony represents a distinct signing event where the recipient completes their assigned actions on the envelope's documents. Returns the created Ceremony object with session details and status. Use this to start the recipient's signing workflow or create additional signing sessions.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks domain context about what a ceremony represents and its role in the signing workflow. Added explanation of ceremony purpose (interactive signing session), what it represents (distinct signing event), return value details, and practical use cases to improve AI agent understanding of this operation's significance in the signing process.
